Terms of Service

Last Updated: April 10, 2026

Service Description

sbti-test.art provides a free online SBTI personality test service. This test is for entertainment purposes only and does not constitute any form of psychological, medical, or professional advice.

Terms of Use

By using this site, you agree to these terms of service. If you do not agree to these terms, please stop using this site. This site is open to users of all ages, but we recommend that minors use it under parental guidance.

Intellectual Property

The original content of the SBTI personality test (including questions, personality descriptions, personality posters, etc.) was created by Bilibili content creator @蛆肉儿串儿, and all related intellectual property rights belong to the original author. This site serves solely as an online implementation platform for the test.

Disclaimer

Test results are for entertainment reference only and do not represent a scientific personality assessment. We are not responsible for any decisions or consequences arising from the use of test results. Please do not use test results for hiring, matchmaking, medical diagnosis, or other serious scenarios.

Prohibited Conduct

Users shall not: (1) use the content of this site for commercial profit; (2) maliciously attack or interfere with the normal operation of this site; (3) scrape or bulk download content from this site; (4) distort or tamper with test results to mislead others.

Service Changes

We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or terminate the service at any time without prior notice.

Terms Modification

We may modify these terms of service from time to time. Continued use of this site after modifications constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

SBTI Test

A More Fun, More Real Personality Test

This test is for entertainment only — don't take it seriously
